title: cyperus altsonii
intro: Cyperus altsonii, also known as Alston's sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Cyperus altsonii often involve infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions, respiratory issues, and infections.
